message:
Return base64-encoded data for image files in read_file

Image files (.png, .jpg, .gif, .webp, .bmp, .svg, .ico) are detected
by extension and magic bytes, then returned as base64 with metadata.
Non-image binary files still return the existing error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
